name: Chicken Noodle Soup (Slow Cooker)
recipeIngredient: 1 Broiler-fryer (3 to 3 1/2 lb), cut up and skinned
2 1/2 cup Uncooked Medium Egg Noodles (4 Oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the first six ingredients in a 3 1/2-quart slow cooker in the order listed.
2. Combine salt and the next six ingredients; sprinkle over vegetables.
3. Add 6 cups water; cover and cook on low setting for 8 to 10 hours.
4. Remove chicken and bay leaf; add remaining 2 cups water.
5. Stir in noodles and cook, covered, on high setting for 20 minutes.
6. Meanwhile, remove bones from chicken and cut into bite-size pieces.
7. Add to slow cooker, stir to mix. Cook for 15 minutes on high setting, covered or until noodles are tender.
Makes 3 1/4 quarts. Serves 8 to 10.
